project.name: ai-cos-cc-adk
project.description: AI Chief of Staff — action optimizer for Aakash Kumar. ContentAgent + SyncAgent live on droplet, 17 MCP tools via ai-cos-mcp server, Notion + Postgres dual-write.

sub_repos.name: aicos-digests
sub_repos.description: Next.js 16 digest site deployed at digest.wiki

last_session.summary: Iteration 30: 76 agents, 8 machines, 7 at loop 20. 19,421 entity connections, 100% embeddings, IRGI 8.75/10, CIR 8.6/10, quality 7.3/10. /comms+/strategy deployed. M7+M8 on droplet.

recent_decisions.decision: Army pattern: specialized single-task agents per loop step
CIR triggers made column-specific to exclude embedding updates
recent_decisions.rationale: Embedding updates were flooding CIR queue (3,495 messages)

recent_decisions.decision: Score compression fix: multiplicative boosts + percentile stretching

next_session_priorities: Commit 284 uncommitted files in parent repo
M12: Notion page content extraction at scale (4,143 companies)
M8: Deploy AgentMail API key, test real email processing
M1: Switch to blended_score, add score breakdown bars
M9: Re-audit after next round of fixes

architecture.summary: Local CC project with MCP server on droplet. ContentAgent (5-min cron) + SyncAgent (10-min cron) live. 17 MCP tools via FastMCP Python. Postgres (7 tables) + Notion (8 DBs) dual-write. Cloudflare Tunnel for public endpoint. digest.wiki via Vercel.
key_patterns: Content pipeline: extraction > analysis > digest > publish
Build traces: rolling window + compaction every 3 iterations
